what_was_done: Fixed CLAUDE.md skill/tool disambiguation. Instances were using built-in Skill() for framework skills (wrap-up, brainstorm, etc.) because CLAUDE.md used /slash notation. Removed all / prefixes, added explicit 'NEVER use Skill tool for framework skills' warning, replaced shorthand with full run_tool() syntax. 5 edits to CLAUDE.md.
known_issues: Memory server cold-start takes 80-160s (model load) — first tool call times out through toolshed
nomic-embed-text-v2-moe without megablocks is CPU-intensive (install megablocks for 3-5x speedup)
Gate 17: injection_attempts type mismatch can crash gate (HIGH)
Gate 1: path traversal ../../../../etc/passwd bypasses extension guard (HIGH)
Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)
next_steps: Fix memory server cold-start: either install megablocks (`pip install git+https://github.com/nomic-ai/megablocks.git`) or add safe background warmup without torch thread leak
Fix 3 HIGH security issues (gate_02 rm -r, gate_17 type mismatch, gate_01 path traversal)
Fix MEDIUM security issues (unicode bypass, injection scan gap, LIVE_STATE guard)
